FR-01.title: Job Seeker Registration
requirements: Register with email and create profile
Upload resume in PDF or DOCX format

FR-02.title: Employer Registration
requirements: Add company profile with logo and description
Company verification via business email domain

FR-03.title: Job Posting
requirements: Post job with title, description, requirements, and salary range
Set job type (full-time, part-time, contract, remote)
Add required skills and experience level

FR-04.title: Job Search and Discovery
requirements: Search jobs by keyword, location, and skills
Filter by salary, job type, experience level, and date posted

FR-05.title: Job Application
requirements: Apply with resume and cover letter
acceptance_criteria: Status shows applied, reviewed, shortlisted, rejected

FR-06.title: Applicant Tracking for Employers
requirements: View all applicants for a job posting
Filter applicants by skills and experience
Move applicants through hiring pipeline stages

FR-08.title: Company Reviews
requirements: Rate work-life balance, salary, culture, and management

FR-01.title: Build Job Seeker Registration API
FR-01.description: Create POST /api/auth/register (seeker type). POST /api/profile/resume (parse uploaded PDF/DOCX). PATCH /api/profile (skills, experience, education). POST /api/preferences (job type, location, salary).

FR-01.title: Build Seeker Profile Setup
FR-01.description: Create multi-step profile wizard: Step 1 personal info, Step 2 resume upload with parsed preview, Step 3 skills/experience form, Step 4 job preferences. Progress indicator.

FR-01.title: Implement Resume Parser
FR-01.description: Build parser service that extracts text from PDF/DOCX. Use NLP to identify name, contact, skills, experience entries, and education. Auto-populate profile fields from parsed data.

FR-02.title: Build Employer Registration API
FR-02.description: Create POST /api/auth/register (employer type, company name, domain). Email domain verification. POST /api/company/profile (logo, description, industry, size). POST /api/company/recruiters (invite).

FR-02.title: Build Company Profile Page
FR-02.description: Create company profile with logo upload, description editor, industry/size selectors, office locations, and benefits list. Public profile page showing all info and job listings.

FR-03.title: Build Job Posting API
FR-03.description: Create POST /api/jobs (title, description, requirements, salary_min, salary_max, type, skills, experience_level, deadline). PATCH /api/jobs/:id. DELETE /api/jobs/:id. Auto-expire past deadline.

FR-03.title: Build Job Posting Form
FR-03.description: Create job posting form with rich text description editor, salary range slider, job type radio buttons, skills tag input, experience level dropdown, and deadline date picker. Preview before publishing.

FR-03.title: Create Jobs Database Schema
FR-03.description: Design jobs table: id, company_id, title, description, requirements, salary_min, salary_max, type (enum), skills (array), experience_level, deadline, status, created_at. Elasticsearch index for search.

FR-04.title: Build Job Search API
FR-04.description: Create GET /api/jobs/search using Elasticsearch. Support keyword, location (geo), skills, salary range, type, experience, date posted filters. Pagination. POST /api/searches (save). GET /api/jobs/recommended (profile match).

FR-04.title: Build Job Search Page
FR-04.description: Create search page with search bar, filter sidebar (salary slider, type checkboxes, experience dropdown), results list with job cards (title, company, salary, type, posted date). Save search button.

FR-05.title: Build Application API
FR-05.description: Create POST /api/jobs/:id/apply (resume, cover_letter). GET /api/applications (user's applications with status). DELETE /api/applications/:id (withdraw). Notify on status change.

FR-05.title: Build Application Flow UI
FR-05.description: Create apply modal with resume selector (uploaded or builder), cover letter textarea, and submit. My Applications page with status badges (applied/reviewed/shortlisted/rejected). Withdraw button.

FR-06.title: Build ATS API
FR-06.description: Create GET /api/jobs/:id/applicants (with filters). PATCH /api/applications/:id/stage (move pipeline: applied, screening, interview, offer, hired, rejected). POST /api/interviews/schedule.

FR-06.title: Build ATS Dashboard
FR-06.description: Create Kanban-style pipeline view with columns per stage. Drag applicant cards between stages. Applicant detail with resume preview. Schedule interview dialog with date/time picker.

FR-07.title: Build Resume Builder API
FR-07.description: Create CRUD for resumes: POST /api/resumes (from template), PATCH /api/resumes/:id. GET /api/resumes/:id/pdf (generate download). Auto-fill from profile. Support multiple versions.

FR-07.title: Build Resume Builder UI
FR-07.description: Create resume editor with template gallery, section-based editor (personal, experience, education, skills), live preview panel, and download PDF button. Auto-populate from profile data.

FR-08.title: Build Company Review API
FR-08.description: Create POST /api/companies/:id/reviews (anonymous, category ratings, text). Company: POST /api/reviews/:id/response. GET /api/companies/:id/reviews (paginated). Calculate averages.

FR-08.title: Build Review Section UI
FR-08.description: Create company review page with category rating bars (work-life, salary, culture, management), individual review cards (anonymous), and review form with star selectors per category.
